sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى الْأَبُ لَحْمًا طَازِجًا مِنَ الْجَزَّارِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je kupio svježe meso od mesara.
sentences.translationEn: The father bought fresh meat from the butcher.

sentences.translation: Donio ga je kući i dao ga majci.
sentences.translationEn: He brought it home and gave it to the mother.

sentences.arabic: طَبَخَتِ الْأُمُّ اللَّحْمَ مَعَ الْبَطَاطَا وَالْبَصَلِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je kuhala meso s krumpirom i lukom.
sentences.translationEn: The mother cooked the meat with potatoes and onions.

sentences.translation: Porodica je jela i hvalila hranu.
sentences.translationEn: The family ate and praised the food.
